seoTitle: Pittsworth vs Placid Hills — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pittsworth and Placid Hills. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pittsworth vs Placid Hills: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pittsworth and Placid Hills.
heading: Pittsworth vs Placid Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pittsworth, Queensland and Placid Hills, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Placid Hills has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Pittsworth (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pittsworth or Placid Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pittsworth has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Placid Hills scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pittsworth scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Placid Hills scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pittsworth or Placid Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Placid Hills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
